notes: Keeps mobile/PWA Pathmark branding metadata from v0.6.38.
Repairs light/dark recognition by responding directly to Streamlit appearance menu selections rather than reading Pathmark-painted backgrounds.
Stores the last selected Streamlit appearance choice for the browser session and applies the matching seasonal light or dark variant.
Strengthens dark and light contrast for the app shell, header, cards, inputs and Streamlit menu popovers.
Keeps seasonal Pathmark themes as Summer, Autumn, Winter and Spring, with appearance controlled by Streamlit Light/Dark/System.
release_notes: Repairs Pathmark light/dark theme switching by listening to Streamlit appearance menu selections and applying the correct seasonal variant.
label: Streamlit appearance recognition repair
